name: firecrawl
description: Firecrawl onboarding and routing for web data: search the web, scrape clean markdown, and interact with live pages via the Firecrawl CLI or API. One install command sets up CLI tools, app-integration build skills, and workflow deliverable skills; the skill routes each request to the right path — live CLI work, app-code integration, web-powered deliverables, credentials, REST-only, or the keyless free tier.
